steps.title: Isolate the matching equation
steps.content:
Start with the given equation:
$$5x+7=22$$
Subtract $7$ from both sides:
$$5x=15$$

steps.title: Select the equivalent form
steps.content:
An equation with the same solution can be the equivalent equation after subtracting $7$ from both sides. The matching equation is
$$5x=15$$
The answer is C.
